scope: Persona-weighted Representation Field introduction across LENS V2 flagship lenses

checks.name: canonical_route_inspected_is_lens_v2_flagship
checks.description: All Playwright captures and inspection were performed on /lens-v2-flagship.
checks.notes: Screenshots saved under docs/psee/PI.LENS.V2.REPRESENTATION-FIELD-AND-PERSONA-CONSOLIDATION.01/screenshots/; page URL on every capture was http://localhost:3002/lens-v2-flagship.

checks.name: app_inspected_is_execlens_demo
checks.description: All edits and inspection targeted app/execlens-demo, not app/gauge-product or any other surface.

checks.name: mode_controls_preserved_and_refined
checks.description: Visible labels BALANCED / DENSE / INVESTIGATION / BOARDROOM preserved; styling refined; BOARDROOM joined the radio-group.
checks.notes: DENSITY_OPTIONS retains label='BALANCED' / 'DENSE' / 'INVESTIGATION'; BOARDROOM is rendered as the fourth button in the same .auth-density-group strip. Inactive contrast lifted (#3a4560 → #7a85a3); active state weight 600; focus-visible outline; hover background lift.

checks.name: persona_mappings_implemented
checks.description: Persona mapping is implemented in UI / accessibility per PERSONA_LENS_MAPPING.md.
checks.notes: role='radiogroup'/radio + aria-checked + aria-label (persona-extended) + title (persona pair) + data-persona attribute + persona-line microcopy with aria-live='polite'.

checks.name: representation_field_implemented
checks.description: RepresentationField component branches by mode and renders four mode-specific fields.
checks.notes: Components: BalancedConsequenceField, DenseTopologyField, InvestigationTraceField, BoardroomAtmosphericField. Branching: boardroomMode override + densityClass switch.

checks.name: balanced_mode_has_executive_consequence
checks.description: BALANCED renders Executive Consequence Field with three vertical anchors connected by a pressure-graded rail.
checks.notes: Visible in screenshots/balanced_1440x900_viewport.png — Source pressure / Coordination absorption / Secondary impact anchors with HIGH/ELEVATED/MODERATE tier colors.

checks.name: dense_mode_has_cto_structural_topology
checks.description: DENSE renders Structural Topology Field with three weighted nodes and gradient-faded edges.
checks.notes: Visible in screenshots/dense_*_viewport.png — ORIGIN/PASS-THROUGH/RECEIVER nodes with pressure-tier glow and connecting edges, plus dense note prose.

checks.name: investigation_mode_has_analyst_evidence_trace
checks.description: INVESTIGATION renders Evidence Trace Field with three vertical trace bands.
checks.notes: Visible in screenshots/investigation_1440x900_viewport.png — Observed pressure / Propagation absorption / Qualified receiver state bands with evidence text and confidence rows; Q-01 advisory flag on the receiver band.

checks.name: boardroom_mode_has_projection_grade_atmospheric
checks.description: BOARDROOM renders Atmospheric Field with glow ring + supportive sentence + scope footer.
checks.notes: Visible in screenshots/boardroom_1440x900_viewport.png and screenshots/boardroom_2560x1440_viewport.png — atmospheric mark, state-color glow, calm boardroom statement, line accent, scope footer.

checks.name: no_legacy_terminology_reintroduced
checks.description: No reintroduction of L7, 51.x, demo/narrative layer, or demo / narrative layer terminology in any deliverable or source change.
checks.method: grep -rn -E '\bL7\b|51\.x|demo/narrative|demo / narrative' against this stream's deliverables and modified source.
checks.notes: Re-grep returned zero matches in the modified source. References in deliverables to legacy terminology appear only in negation contexts (documenting non-reintroduction).

checks.name: no_governance_mutation
checks.description: No changes to docs/governance/, validators, or any governance contract.
checks.notes: git diff confirms changes scoped to docs/psee/PI.LENS.V2.REPRESENTATION-FIELD-AND-PERSONA-CONSOLIDATION.01/, docs/pios/PI.LENS.V2.REPRESENTATION-FIELD-AND-PERSONA-CONSOLIDATION.01/, and app/execlens-demo/pages/lens-v2-flagship.js.

checks.name: no_evidence_semantic_mutation
checks.description: No changes to evidence semantics, signal interpretation, render-state vocabulary, qualifier-class semantics, propagation logic, or governance ribbon pass/fail logic.
checks.notes: Render-state vocabulary preserved verbatim. Qualifier semantics (Q-00 / Q-01) preserved. Orchestration module untouched. Fixture untouched. Governance verdict logic untouched.

checks.name: no_unrelated_route_mutation
checks.description: No edits to other routes within app/execlens-demo, no edits to app/gauge-product or any unrelated frontend surface.
checks.notes: git diff confirms exactly one source file modified: app/execlens-demo/pages/lens-v2-flagship.js.

checks.name: no_old_static_topology_regression
checks.description: Topology composition in DENSE mode is a small deliberate three-node AI-enriched representation, not a copy of any prior static topology panel.
checks.notes: Three nodes with role labels (ORIGIN/PASS-THROUGH/RECEIVER), domain aliases, pressure-tier glow, gradient-faded edges. Zero edge crossings. No pan/zoom, no drag, no force-directed library. CSS / JSX only — no new dependencies. Conformant with TOPOLOGY_REINTRODUCTION_GUARDRAIL.md.

checks.name: no_dashboard_card_grid_regression
checks.description: No regular grid of identical-width components on the primary surface; no KPI tiles; no metric grids; no chart cards.
checks.notes: Representation Field uses composed vertical structures (anchors / topology / trace bands / atmospheric mark) — none are 3+ identical components. The lower evidence-layer composition from previous iteration (1 dominant + 2 supporting) is unchanged.

checks.name: playwright_screenshots_captured_for_all_modes
checks.description: Screenshots captured for BALANCED / DENSE / INVESTIGATION / BOARDROOM at the mandatory viewport (1440x900) plus additional viewports where feasible.
checks.notes: 11 PNG total: balanced (viewport+full at 1440x900), dense (viewport+full at 1440x900, viewport at 1728x1117 and 1280x800), investigation (viewport+full at 1440x900), boardroom (viewport+full at 1440x900, viewport at 2560x1440).
